title: The Spoiler Collaboration
description:
My 15th fucking collaboration!

This time, the goal of this collaboration was to take a plot critical scene out of any form of moving picture (or audio, but nobody chose to make a remix out of a plot critical moment in an audio drama) and then remixing it for your pleasure (THEY WILL GIVE YOU INFINITE PLEASURE SLASH SPECIAL FOR YOU OF CHILDREN DESIGN), though I can't emphasise enough that the remixes aren't still free of any spoilers.

Participants/Movie they've used:

- TAW012294 (Halo 4 & Harry Potter 6)
- dimitripetrov1 (Firewall) (he didn't use Red Dawn)
- import3dguest (The End of Evangelion)
- CorruptionSound (Spaceballs & Planet Of The Apes (1968))
- MOTHER2EARTHBOUNDFAN6543 (Splash)

Thanks for participating!
